after.label: same-frame-floating-debug-to-bottom:after

caveats: In-app browser evaluate scope is read-only/non-extensible, so actor-input global smoke hook could not be installed.
In-app browser evaluate scope does not expose localStorage; persisted layout actor-id leak is covered by unit tests in this run.
